report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages — Railgun Privacy DeFi Guide 2026 and No-Code AI Trading Agents Guide 2026 — with full SEO metadata, structured data, and internal linking; added both to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Privacy DeFi is a growing narrative: Railgun TVL reached $108M+ with $4.5B cumulative volume across 4 chains; Ethereum Foundation staked 50K RAIL; Private Proofs of Innocence differentiate it from sanctioned mixers like Tornado Cash

No-code AI trading agents are surging: 250K+ daily active on-chain AI agents (400% YoY growth), 68% of new DeFi protocols include AI agents, Walbi launched no-code platform with 2.9M users and 9,500+ agents created in beta
AI agents outperform human traders by 27% accuracy on prediction markets; 41% of crypto hedge funds actively testing on-chain AI agents
Privacy DeFi ecosystem expanding beyond Railgun: Aztec Network (ZK rollup), Penumbra (private Cosmos chain), Secret Network, Namada all active

sections.title: Content Created
items: Railgun Privacy DeFi Guide 2026 (~2800 words): covers how Railgun works with zk-SNARKs, comparison with privacy coins and mixers, Private Proofs of Innocence, key use cases (private swaps, shielded portfolios, MEV protection), ecosystem overview, getting started guide, and 6 FAQs

No-Code AI Trading Agents Guide 2026 (~2800 words): covers how no-code AI agents work, platform comparison (Walbi, CodakAI, 3Commas, Mudrex), step-by-step agent building guide, AI agents vs traditional bots comparison, risks and limitations, AI agent marketplace future, and 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Railgun page: title='Railgun & Privacy DeFi Guide 2026: Private Transactions Without Leaving DeFi', target keyword='privacy DeFi Railgun 2026', Article + FAQ schemas, 6 FAQ rich snippet entries

AI Agents page: title='No-Code AI Trading Agents Guide 2026: Build Your Own Crypto Trading Bot Without Code', target keyword='no-code AI trading agents crypto 2026', Article + FAQ schemas, 6 FAQ rich snippet entries
Both pages include OpenGraph and Twitter card metadata, structured data via JSON-LD, internal links to 6+ related guides each
